sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n100934" key="sunr" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="pref" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνρ-</orth>, <orth extent="pref" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνσ-</orth>, <orth extent="pref" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνσκ-</orth>, <orth extent="pref" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνστ-</orth>:—for words so written <sense id="n100934.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">συρρ-, συσσ-, συσκ-, συστ-</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
